description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a job named Deployment that runs in the deploy stage. In its before_script run `gem install dpl` and `wget -qO- https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh` to install the Heroku CLI. In the script execute `dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, then `export HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY`, and finally `heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate`. Set the job environment to production with URL `$HEROKU_APP_HOST`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
